border-block-end-color.$description: Color of the row separator border

border-block-end-width.$description: Width of the row separator border

gap.$description: Horizontal gap between columns in the grid layout

padding-block.$description: Vertical spacing around each row — applies in both stacked and grid layout; matches Table cell padding

color.$description: Text color of the key cell

font-weight.$description: Bold weight distinguishes the key from the value visually

basis.$description: Width of the key column in the grid layout

color.$description: Text color of the value cell

gap.$description: Gap between multiple action links in a single row

margin-block-start-stacked.$description: Extra space above the actions cell in the stacked (mobile) layout
